page_metadata.biotools__summary: SBOLCavas is a web application for creation and editing of genetic constructs using the SBOL data and visual standard. SBOLCanvas allows a user to create a genetic design from start to finish, with the option to incorporate existing SBOL data from a SynBioHub repository.
